title: BSV - Bitcoin SV (BSV) to Bitcoin (BTC) segwit

actions.value: Unfortunately, BitcoinSV (BSV) sent to a BItcoin (BTC) segwit 3-address cannot be recovered at this time. Prior to BSV's fork from BCH in November 2018, it was technically possible to recover funds sent to a segwit address with the help of a miner. At this time, we're unaware of any BSV mining pools who are able to help.

raw_title: BSV - Bitcoin SV (BSV) to Bitcoin (BTC) segwit
